DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. MOTION FOR ORDER: TRUTH OF MATTERS SPECIFIED IN REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS BE DEEMED ADMITTED. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT BRIAN JONES IS DEEMED TO HAVE ADMITTED: (A) THE TRUTH OF EACH MATTER SPECIFIED IN CAVALRY'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS TO DEFENDANT, SET ONE (1), REQUEST NUMBERS 1 THROUGH 8; AND (B) THE GENUINENESS OF EACH DOCUMENT SPECIFIED IN CAVALRY'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS TO DEFENDANT, SET ONE (1), GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS ITEM 1. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Leung Lerche of Quall Cardot, Telephone (415) 680-5731, speacially appearing on behalf of Plaintiff CAVALRY SPV I, LLC.;
Brian Jones, Telpehone (415) 751-2087, appearing in Pro Per; *Mr. Jones appeared to the hearing at 9:25 a.m.*

Hearing is held and the Court makes the following ruling:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC. Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted

The unopposed motion is granted. Defendant Brian Jones is deemed to have admitted: (a) the truth of each matter specified in Cavalry's Requests for Admissions to Defendant, Set One (1), Request Numbers 1 through 8; and (b) the genuineness of each document specified in Cavalry's Requests for Admissions to Defendant, Set One (1), Genuineness of Documents Item 1.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
